levels.name: Baby Step
levels.hint: Move forward once to grab the snack.

levels.name: Two Paws
levels.hint: Keep moving in the same direction.

levels.name: Up We Go
levels.hint: Forward also works when facing up.

levels.name: Tall Trail
levels.hint: Walk straight to the top.

levels.name: Down Down
levels.hint: You can also go down

levels.name: First Turn
levels.hint: Rotate before you move.

levels.name: Turn And Walk
levels.hint: Face up, then keep going.

levels.name: Right Corner
levels.hint: Make one turn to reach the corner.

levels.name: Two Bends
levels.hint: You need more than one rotation here.

levels.name: Top Shelf
levels.hint: Turn, walk, and turn again if needed.

levels.name: Spin Practice
levels.hint: The goal is behind you and above you.

levels.name: Ready To Navigate
levels.hint: Movement and rotation together unlock every path.

levels.name: First Wall
levels.hint: Walls cannot be crossed, so go around.

levels.name: L Shape
levels.hint: The direct route is closed by a small corner wall.

levels.name: Narrow Gate
levels.hint: Find the opening and pass through it.

levels.name: Wall Hugger
levels.hint: Follow the edge to get around the blocks.

levels.name: Small Maze
levels.hint: A few turns and a detour will solve it.

levels.name: Cross Corridor
levels.hint: Use the open corridor, not the blocked center.

levels.name: Side Streets
levels.hint: The center is blocked, so take the side path.

levels.name: Find the way
levels.hint: Find the way to the goal

levels.name: First Jump
levels.hint: Jump over the hole to land safely.

levels.name: Jump Lane
levels.hint: The center lane teaches a clean jump.

levels.name: Leap Then Turn
levels.hint: Jump first, then rotate to reach the food.

levels.name: Double Gap
levels.hint: You can solve this with two separate jumps.

levels.name: Upper Bridge
levels.hint: Rotate, line up with the gap, and jump across.

levels.name: Landing Zone
levels.hint: Plan the jump so you land on an open cell.

levels.name: Find the Way
levels.hint: Find the way the goal

levels.name: Find the Way 2
levels.hint: Find the way the goal

levels.name: Two Treats
levels.hint: You win only after collecting both foods.

levels.name: Three Stops
levels.hint: There are three goals, so your route matters.

levels.name: Leap For Lunch
levels.hint: Jump to one goal, then continue to the second.

levels.name: Corner Cleanup
levels.hint: Clear both corners before finishing the level.

levels.name: Five Crumbs
levels.hint: A long route is fine as long as you collect them all.

levels.name: Find the Way
levels.hint: A long route is fine as long as you collect them all.

levels.name: Find the Way 2
levels.hint: A long route is fine as long as you collect them all.

levels.name: Find the Way 3
levels.hint: A long route is fine as long as you collect them all.

levels.name: First Break
levels.hint: Break the obstacle in front of you before moving on.

levels.name: Break And Turn
levels.hint: Open the path, then rotate toward the food.

levels.name: Double Break
levels.hint: Two breakable blocks stand between you and the goal.

levels.name: Break For Both
levels.hint: Break the block, then collect both foods.

levels.name: Break Then Jump
levels.hint: Use break first, then line up a jump over the hole.

levels.name: Crack The Maze
levels.hint: Some walls go around, one wall must be broken.

levels.name: Crack The Maze 2
levels.hint: Walls must be broken and don't forget to jump

levels.name: Crack The Maze 3
levels.hint: Walls must be broken and don't forget to jump

levels.name: Crack The Maze 4
levels.hint: Walls must be broken and don't forget to jump

levels.name: Blue Switch
levels.hint: Step on the switch to open the blue gate.

levels.name: Blue Switch 2
levels.hint: Be careful wiuth the multiple switches

levels.name: Switchback Path
levels.hint: Hit the switch, then return through the opened route.

levels.name: Switchback Path 2
levels.hint: Hit the switch, then return through the opened route.

levels.name: Switchback Path 3
levels.hint: Hit the switch, then return through the opened route.

levels.name: Gatekeeper
levels.hint: The switch controls a whole gate, not just one tile.

levels.name: Switch, Jump, Snack
levels.hint: Open the gate, then combine movement with a jump.

levels.name: Switch, Jump, Snack  2
levels.hint: Open the gate, then combine movement with a jump.

levels.name: Two Colors
levels.hint: Each switch opens a different color gate.

levels.name: Twin Gates
levels.hint: Open one gate, then the other, to finish the route.

levels.name: Master Walk
levels.hint: Use every skill you learned to clear the final route.

levels.name: Master Walk 2
levels.hint: Use every skill you learned to clear the final route.

levels.name: Master Walk 3
levels.hint: Use every skill you learned to clear the final route.
